_note: TEMPLATE values. Replace with real Pentamachine V2-50CHB specs once Matt provides them.

a._note: A-axis tilts the work around X. Pentamachine V2 convention; confirm limits with Matt.

b._note: B-axis rotates the work around Z. Often unlimited (continuous).

a_to_table._note: Offset from A-axis rotation line to the top of the B-table.

b_to_a._note: Offset from B-axis rotation line to the A-axis rotation line.

singularity_notes: A-axis near 0 deg causes B-axis gimbal behaviour; post-processor should favour small A rather than A=0 when reachable.
At A = 90 deg the tool is cutting parallel to the table — confirm this is within Pentamachine's acceptable posture.
